display.purpose: Hero headings and major dashboard statements.

title.purpose: Cards, modals, tables, and nav labels.

body.purpose: Operational copy, form help, and table cells.

label.purpose: Badges, chips, metadata, and compact labels.

shadows.name: card-low
shadows.purpose: Default dashboard cards and calm panels.

shadows.name: modal-high
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and overlays above the app shell.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Card lift, button feedback, and panel state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button for standard CoopChain workflows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 20px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #168c96, #169b62); color: #fff; font-family: Sarabun, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(22,155,98,.22); transition: transform 150ms ease, filter 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); filter: brightness(.97); box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(22,155,98,.26); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(22,155,98,.28); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action button for links, filters, and non-primary commands.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-secondary">ดูรายละเอียด</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 44px; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: #2563eb; font-family: Sarabun, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #eff6ff; border-color: #bfdbfe; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(37,99,235,.22); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Operational Card
components.description: Standard white panel for dashboards, summaries, and forms.
components.html:
ประชุมใหญ่เดือนนี้
3
รายการที่ต้องติดตาม
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; color: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(20,32,51,.06); font-family: Sarabun, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(20,32,51,.08); } .ds-card-title { color: #64748b; font-size: .875rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card-value { margin-top: 6px; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; } .ds-card-note { margin-top: 8px; color: #64748b; font-size: .82rem; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Default text field with clear label and green focus treatment.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #0f172a; font-family: Sarabun, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; } .ds-field input { min-height: 48px; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: #0f172a; font: inherit; font-weight: 400; } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-field input:focus { border-color: rgba(22,155,98,.55); box-shadow: 0 0 0 .22rem rgba(22,155,98,.13); outline: 0; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact status badge with semantic color and text.
components.css: .ds-chip-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: #ecfdf5; color: #059669; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; font-family: Sarabun, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-chip-success::before { content: ''; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: #169b62; }

components.name: Dark Sidebar Nav
components.description: Dashboard shell navigation for dense operational screens.
components.html: แดชบอร์ดห้องประชุม
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: grid; gap: 6px; width: 240px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(180deg,#17263b,#0f1a29); font-family: Sarabun, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link { color: #bdcad8; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; font-weight: 700; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link.ds-active { color: #fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,.11); transform: translateX(2px); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(126,212,173,.3); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: CoopChain is a dependable public-service workspace for Chaiyaphum cooperative operations. The design uses Sarabun, green and teal accents, white cards, cool backgrounds, familiar Bootstrap controls, and clear table-first layouts.
keyCharacteristics: Task-first product UI with familiar Bootstrap affordances.
Green and teal as the official service identity.
White cards on cool light backgrounds.

rules.name: The Official Accent Rule
rules.body: Green or teal should carry the primary action on CoopChain operational screens.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Use Sarabun everywhere unless rendering codes, IDs, or technical values.

rules.name: The Border First Rule
rules.body: Use borders and tonal backgrounds for structure before adding large shadows.

dos: Do use Cooperative Green for primary actions and official identity cues.
Do keep table text and dashboard counts readable.
Do test mobile layouts for horizontal overflow.
donts: Don't make CoopChain feel like a loud marketing page.
Don't over-decorate dashboards with visual spectacle.
Don't use low-contrast gray text on light backgrounds.
Don't use playful color palettes that weaken public-office trust.
